title: Valid Parentheses
coreIdea: Determine if a string of brackets is validly matched and nested. Use a stack to track opening brackets; when a closing bracket appears, it must match the most recent unmatched opening bracket (top of stack).
recognitionCues: asks if brackets are validly matched/balanced
approach: Push opening brackets onto a stack. On a closing bracket, check if the stack is non-empty and its top matches the corresponding opening bracket; if so pop, else return false. At the end, string is valid only if stack is empty.
